description: A 12-second 16:9 app showcase composition — three floating iPhone screens hover in 3D space, each rotating in turn to surface a different feature, beat-synced label callouts, end logo lockup. Built directly on the HyperFrames `app-showcase` catalog block.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 12 秒 16:9 应用展示合成 — 三部 iPhone 屏幕悬浮于 3D 空间中，依次旋转展示不同功能，配有节拍同步的标签说明和结尾 logo 锁定。基于 HyperFrames `app-showcase` 目录块直接构建。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 12 秒 16:9 應用程式展示合成 — 三部 iPhone 螢幕懸浮於 3D 空間中，依次旋轉展示不同功能，配有節拍同步的標籤說明和結尾 logo 鎖定。基於 HyperFrames `app-showcase` 目錄區塊直接建構。
description_i18n.ja: 12秒の16:9アプリ紹介コンポジション — 3台のiPhone画面が3D空間に浮遊し、順番に回転して異なる機能を表示。ビート同期のラベルコールアウトとエンドロゴロックアップ付き。HyperFrames `app-showcase` カタログブロック上に直接構築。
description_i18n.ko: 12초 16:9 앱 쇼케이스 컴포지션 — 세 대의 iPhone 화면이 3D 공간에 떠 있으며, 각각 순서대로 회전하여 다른 기능을 표시하고, 비트 동기화된 라벨 콜아웃과 엔딩 로고 락업 포함. HyperFrames `app-showcase` 카탈로그 블록 기반으로 직접 제작.
description_i18n.de: Eine 12-sekündige 16:9-App-Showcase-Komposition — drei schwebende iPhone-Bildschirme schweben im 3D-Raum, drehen sich nacheinander, um verschiedene Funktionen hervorzuheben, mit beat-synchronisierten Label-Callouts und abschließendem Logo-Lockup. Direkt auf dem HyperFrames `app-showcase` Katalogblock aufgebaut.
description_i18n.fr: Une composition de vitrine d'app de 12 secondes en 16:9 — trois écrans iPhone flottent dans un espace 3D, chacun pivotant à son tour pour présenter une fonctionnalité différente, avec des annotations synchronisées au rythme et un logo final. Construit directement sur le bloc catalogue `app-showcase` de HyperFrames.
description_i18n.ru: 12-секундная композиция презентации приложения 16:9 — три экрана iPhone парят в 3D-пространстве, поочерёдно вращаясь для демонстрации различных функций, с синхронизированными по ритму подписями и финальным логотипом. Создано непосредственно на каталожном блоке `app-showcase` HyperFrames.
description_i18n.es: Una composición de presentación de app de 12 segundos en 16:9 — tres pantallas iPhone flotan en espacio 3D, cada una rotando por turnos para mostrar una función diferente, con llamadas de etiquetas sincronizadas al ritmo y logo final. Construido directamente sobre el bloque de catálogo `app-showcase` de HyperFrames.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Uma composição de apresentação de app de 12 segundos em 16:9 — três telas de iPhone flutuam no espaço 3D, cada uma girando por vez para destacar um recurso diferente, com legendas sincronizadas com a batida e logo final. Construído diretamente sobre o bloco de catálogo `app-showcase` do HyperFrames.
description_i18n.it: Una composizione di vetrina app da 12 secondi in 16:9 — tre schermi iPhone fluttuano nello spazio 3D, ciascuno ruotando a turno per mostrare una funzionalità diversa, con callout di etichette sincronizzati al ritmo e logo finale. Costruito direttamente sul blocco catalogo `app-showcase` di HyperFrames.
description_i18n.vi: Bố cục giới thiệu ứng dụng 12 giây 16:9 — ba màn hình iPhone nổi trong không gian 3D, lần lượt xoay để hiển thị các tính năng khác nhau, với nhãn chú thích đồng bộ nhịp và logo kết thúc. Được xây dựng trực tiếp trên khối danh mục `app-showcase` của HyperFrames.
description_i18n.pl: 12-sekundowa kompozycja prezentacji aplikacji w formacie 16:9 — trzy ekrany iPhone unoszą się w przestrzeni 3D, każdy obraca się kolejno, aby pokazać inną funkcję, z synchronizowanymi z rytmem etykietami i końcowym logo. Zbudowane bezpośrednio na bloku katalogu `app-showcase` HyperFrames.
description_i18n.id: Komposisi tampilan aplikasi 12 detik 16:9 — tiga layar iPhone melayang di ruang 3D, masing-masing berputar secara bergantian untuk menampilkan fitur yang berbeda, dengan label callout yang disinkronkan dengan irama dan logo akhir. Dibangun langsung di atas blok katalog `app-showcase` HyperFrames.
description_i18n.nl: Een 12-seconden 16:9 app-showcase compositie — drie zwevende iPhone-schermen zweven in 3D-ruimte, elk draaiend om beurten om een andere functie te tonen, met beat-gesynchroniseerde label callouts en eindlogo lockup. Direct gebouwd op het HyperFrames `app-showcase` catalogusblok.
description_i18n.ar: تركيبة عرض تطبيق مدتها 12 ثانية بنسبة 16:9 — ثلاث شاشات iPhone تحوم في فضاء ثلاثي الأبعاد، تدور كل واحدة بالتناوب لإظهار ميزة مختلفة، مع تسميات توضيحية متزامنة مع الإيقاع وشعار ختامي. مبني مباشرة على كتلة الكتالوج `app-showcase` من HyperFrames.
description_i18n.tr: 12 saniyelik 16:9 uygulama vitrini kompozisyonu — üç iPhone ekranı 3D uzayda süzülür, her biri sırayla farklı bir özelliği göstermek için döner, ritimle senkronize etiket çağrıları ve son logo kilidi ile. Doğrudan HyperFrames `app-showcase` katalog bloğu üzerine inşa edilmiştir.
description_i18n.uk: 12-секундна композиція презентації додатка 16:9 — три екрани iPhone парять у 3D-просторі, по черзі обертаючись для демонстрації різних функцій, із синхронізованими з ритмом підписами та фінальним логотипом. Створено безпосередньо на каталоговому блоці `app-showcase` HyperFrames.
description_i18n.en: A 12-second 16:9 app showcase composition — three floating iPhone screens hover in 3D space, each rotating in turn to surface a different feature, beat-synced label callouts, end logo lockup. Built directly on the HyperFrames `app-showcase` catalog block.

query.en:
Build a 12-second HyperFrames app-showcase composition (1920×1080, 30fps) with three floating iPhone screens, each highlighting a feature of a fictional fitness app. Pull `npx hyperframes add app-showcase`, `npx hyperframes add ui-3d-reveal`, `npx hyperframes add shimmer-sweep`, and `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`.

Visual identity: warm canvas #fff5e8, ink text #1a1410, single hot accent #ff5e3a, secondary teal #2bbab2 used only on the active feature pill. Display: "General Sans" 88px for the headline; body "Inter" 24px; mono on the in-app data labels.

The three phones (left, center, right) carry these screens — render each as a sub-composition under `screens/`:
1. Left phone — workout summary card (3 rings, distance / pace / heart-rate).
2. Center phone — live activity timer (large MM:SS counter, tabular-nums), pause / resume buttons.
3. Right phone — weekly streak grid (7 cells × 4 rows, the active week glowing).

Animation (12s total):
• 0–1.0s — headline "YOUR WEEK, IN MOTION" rises from y=50 → 0 over 0.7s ease expo.out at the top of the canvas. A hairline rule wipes in below it.
• 0.6–2.0s — the three phones fly in via ui-3d-reveal: left from x=-260 + rotateY=-20°, right from x=+260 + rotateY=+20°, center from z=-300, all easing expo.out 1.4s, staggered 180ms.
• 2.0–4.0s — left phone front-facing: rotateY tweens to 0°, scale to 1.04 over 0.6s, then a label callout "workout summary" types in to its left over 0.4s. Hold 1s. Then phone returns to its idle 3D pose.
• 4.0–6.0s — center phone takes over with the same beat (label callout "live activity").
• 6.0–8.0s — right phone takes over (label callout "streaks").
• 8.0–10.0s — all three phones reset to idle, gently bobbing on a sin wave (deterministic, finite repeats — calculate cycles from the 2.0s window).
• 10.0–12.0s — logo-outro fires in the bottom-right corner with a final shimmer-sweep across the headline.

Non-negotiables: deterministic only; entrance-only animations; phones use a non-timed wrapper `<div>` if you nest video screens — never put video directly inside a timed clip; no `repeat: -1` (compute exact cycle count); min 24px on label callouts; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=12. Run `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 12` to catch label overlap with phones.

Output: `app-showcase-12s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 12-second HyperFrames app-showcase composition (1920×1080, 30fps) with three floating iPhone screens, each highlighting a feature of a fictional fitness app. Pull `npx hyperframes add app-showcase`, `npx hyperframes add ui-3d-reveal`, `npx hyperframes add shimmer-sweep`, and `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`.

Visual identity: warm canvas #fff5e8, ink text #1a1410, single hot accent #ff5e3a, secondary teal #2bbab2 used only on the active feature pill. Display: "General Sans" 88px for the headline; body "Inter" 24px; mono on the in-app data labels.

The three phones (left, center, right) carry these screens — render each as a sub-composition under `screens/`:
1. Left phone — workout summary card (3 rings, distance / pace / heart-rate).
2. Center phone — live activity timer (large MM:SS counter, tabular-nums), pause / resume buttons.
3. Right phone — weekly streak grid (7 cells × 4 rows, the active week glowing).

Animation (12s total):
• 0–1.0s — headline "YOUR WEEK, IN MOTION" rises from y=50 → 0 over 0.7s ease expo.out at the top of the canvas. A hairline rule wipes in below it.
• 0.6–2.0s — the three phones fly in via ui-3d-reveal: left from x=-260 + rotateY=-20°, right from x=+260 + rotateY=+20°, center from z=-300, all easing expo.out 1.4s, staggered 180ms.
• 2.0–4.0s — left phone front-facing: rotateY tweens to 0°, scale to 1.04 over 0.6s, then a label callout "workout summary" types in to its left over 0.4s. Hold 1s. Then phone returns to its idle 3D pose.
• 4.0–6.0s — center phone takes over with the same beat (label callout "live activity").
• 6.0–8.0s — right phone takes over (label callout "streaks").
• 8.0–10.0s — all three phones reset to idle, gently bobbing on a sin wave (deterministic, finite repeats — calculate cycles from the 2.0s window).
• 10.0–12.0s — logo-outro fires in the bottom-right corner with a final shimmer-sweep across the headline.

Run `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 12` to catch label overlap with phones.

Output: `app-showcase-12s.mp4`.
